case_title: ROSEMARY MACGUINNESS VS. PETER GADJAKOV et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GADJAKOV, PETER
